title: Gurudwara Guptsar Sahib
tagline: Gurudwara Guptsar Sahib — spiritual town of Punjab

overview.short: Guptsar Sahib (Punjabi: ਗੁਪਤਸਰ ਸਾਹਿਬ) is a holy Gurdwara (English: Sikh shrine) located on the outskirts of Chhattiana village of Sri Muktsar Sahib district in Punjab, India.
overview.description: Guptsar Sahib (Punjabi: ਗੁਪਤਸਰ ਸਾਹਿਬ) is a holy Gurdwara (English: Sikh shrine) located on the outskirts of Chhattiana village of Sri Muktsar Sahib district in Punjab, India.

topPlaces.name: Chhattiana, Punjab
topPlaces.description: Chhattiana is a village in the Giddarbaha tehsil of Sri Muktsar Sahib district in Punjab, India.'

topPlaces.name: Rukhala
topPlaces.description: Rukhala is a village under Giddarbaha Tehsil in Sri Muktsar Sahib district in the Indian state of Punjab (Eastern Punjab).

topPlaces.name: Bhalaiana
topPlaces.description: Bhalaiana, sometimes spelled Bhallaiana is a village in the Giddarbaha tehsil of Sri Muktsar Sahib district in Eastern Punjab, India.

topPlaces.name: Buttar Sarinh
topPlaces.description: Buttar Sarinh , other spellings include Buttar Shrin and Buttar Shri, is a small village in the Giddarbaha tehsil of Sri Muktsar Sahib district in Punjab, India. It's located on the Sri Muktsar Sahib-Bathinda national Highway 754.

topPlaces.name: Doda, Punjab
topPlaces.description: Doda is a village-city in the Sri Muktsar Sahib district of Punjab, India.

topPlaces.name: Kauni, Sri Muktsar Sahib
topPlaces.description: Kaoni is a village in the Sri Muktsar Sahib district of Punjab, India. Its located 18km to east of Muktsar and 28km to North of Gidderbaha town.

topPlaces.name: Bhisiana
topPlaces.description: Bhisiana is a census town in Bathinda district in the state of Punjab, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Gurudwara Guptsar Sahib?
faq.a: The best time to visit Gurudwara Guptsar Sahib is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Gurudwara Guptsar Sahib?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Sri Guru Ram Dass Jee International Airport, Amritsar (155 km) and the nearest railway station is Ludhiana Junction (130 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Gurudwara Guptsar Sahib?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Gurudwara Guptsar Sahib at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Gurudwara Guptsar Sahib?
faq.a: Stays in Gurudwara Guptsar Sahib start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Gurudwara Guptsar Sahib?
faq.a: The top attractions are Chhattiana, Punjab, Rukhala, Bhalaiana, Buttar Sarinh, Doda, Punjab.
